hooks.command: B=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); M=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); git fetch origin main --quiet 2>/dev/null; BH=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/main 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); HS=$(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=3 -o BatchMode=yes homeserver.local 'cd /opt/Code/DaylightStation && git fetch origin --quiet 2>/dev/null; git rev-list --count origin/main..HEAD' 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); C=$(sudo docker inspect --format='{{.State.Status}}' daylight-station 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); chk() { if command -v ss >/dev/null 2>&1; then ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ":$1"; else lsof -nP -iTCP:"$1" -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; }; BP=$(chk 3112 && echo 'UP' || echo 'DOWN'); AP=$(chk 3111 && echo 'UP' || echo 'DOWN'); jq -n --arg msg "Branch: $B | $M files changed | behind origin/main: $BH | homeserver unpushed: $HS | Container: $C | :3112 $BP :3111 $AP" '{"systemMessage": $msg}'

jq -r 'if ((.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("frontend/src/")) and (((.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("lib/logging")) | not) then (.tool_input.new_string // .tool_input.content // "") else empty end' | grep -qE 'console\.(log|debug|warn|info|error)\(' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Raw console.* call added under frontend/src/. CLAUDE.md requires the structured logging framework (frontend/src/lib/logging/) — use getLogger().child({component}) and logger.debug/info/warn/error. Raw console.error is acceptable only in pre-existing .catch() blocks. Replace it unless it clearly qualifies."}}' || true
